exceptions.surface: Package installation into local envctl and nu_plugin checkouts
exceptions.description: The installer requires operator-supplied repository roots and copies namespaced prompt/schema/agent files into two external checkouts.
exceptions.handling: Run only from the package root with explicit --envctl-repo and --nu-plugin-repo arguments; preserve additive copy semantics.

exceptions.description: The bootstrap script writes a per-run context file, builds a temporary prompt, changes into the envctl repository, and launches Codex with package-local config.
exceptions.handling: Treat the generated run context and Codex CLI flags as environment-specific; validate the command surface before operator handoff.

exceptions.description: Packet execution can be started through nohup with stdout/stderr redirected under logs/ and the PID echoed for outside tracking.
exceptions.handling: Require the task proof named by the packet before advancing dependencies, and keep the codex-exec stdout log as execution evidence.

exceptions.description: The Nu operator flow includes explicit approval, pause, and resume commands instead of fully autonomous execution.
exceptions.handling: Keep approval rows and reason strings in envctl evidence; stop goal-loop advancement while approvals are pending.

exceptions.description: Registry evidence intentionally rejects blocked path classes, so sensitive source paths must be represented by redacted summaries rather than copied evidence.
exceptions.handling: Use only policy-safe artifact paths and rely on redaction controls for scan/log/proof persistence.

exceptions.surface: Proof ledger as the task completion source
exceptions.description: The framework does not treat generated files alone as completion; a proof record must be present in the ledger.
exceptions.handling: Append a task proof after writing artifacts, then refresh generated/status_from_proofs.json from the ledger.

exceptions.description: The rollback plan is file-scoped and must remove only files added by this task while preserving the shared pre-execution manifest.
exceptions.handling: Remove the task-local artifacts, report, heartbeat, log, proof, and ledger entry together if ART-134 is rolled back.

exceptions.surface: Prior FlexNetOS migration package retained under source/
exceptions.description: The upgraded package carries the earlier FlexNetOS prompt package as source material, including older helper scripts and expected-output contracts.
exceptions.handling: Treat source/codex-flexnetos-migration-prompt-package as evidence input, not as the active envctl-nu_plugin execution surface.

exceptions.surface: Migration target and repo roots supplied outside the execution framework
exceptions.description: Target descriptors and execution packets reference operator-provided roots such as MIGRATION_TARGET_ROOT, ENVCTL_REPO, and NU_PLUGIN_REPO.
exceptions.handling: Resolve roots at execution time and keep artifacts under migration-artifacts/ or execution-framework/ unless a packet explicitly allows external repo writes.

exceptions.description: Replay is split between verify-only, dry-run-plan, execute-safe, and execute-full, with explicit approval required for high-risk execution.
exceptions.handling: Run verify-only or dry-run replay for automated evidence; require approval records before execute-full.
